hero.title: Quantum BTC
hero.subtitle: The Ultimate Lightning Network Stress-Test
hero.description: Not a game of chance. A provably fair cryptographic experiment funding the future of Bitcoin's post-quantum security.

manifesto.title: The Quantum Manifesto
manifesto.content: Satoshi Nakamoto's vision requires defense against tomorrow's threats. We are using micro-transactions to stress-test the Lightning Network, while funding research into quantum-resistant cryptography.

l1_l2.title: L1 Vault vs L2 Pocket
l1_l2.l1: Bitcoin Layer 1 is the vault. Slow, expensive, but immutable.
l1_l2.l2: Lightning Network is your pocket wallet. Instant, extremely cheap, perfect for everyday use.

wallets.title: Recommended Lightning Wallets
wallets.muun: Good for beginners. Beware of high hidden fees if the main network (L1) is congested.
wallets.phoenix: Excellent non-custodial wallet. Perfect for users in emerging markets.
wallets.wos: Custodial but easiest for immediate onboarding. Only store small amounts to test the network.

faq.title: Security FAQ
faq.a1: No. This is a stress-taste mechanism designed to extract verifiable entropy and fund open-source research.
faq.a2: We use the Drand network for provable, verifiable randomness. The hash is transparent.
